title: Thoughts About Evangelion Biology
wikitext:
[]: Thoughts About Evangelion Biology             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Dec 30, 2007 11:50 am Here are some things that are never addressed in the series: -Since the Evangelions have human souls, why were they never developed with the ability to talk? At least with Unit 01, that would have certainly made Gendo feel less alone, and surely it would have made Yui feel less trapped. -Can Evangelions get cancer? -According to the anatomy page Reichu has compiled, the Evangelions have cowper glands and prostate glands. BUT THEY'RE SUPPOSED TO BE FEMALE. Whaaat? Do the GAINAX folks just not know basic anatomy? -"Oh no! We've lost the connection to the intestinal bacteria!"

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Dec 30, 2007 11:52 am I lolled. If the Evas have prostate and Cowper's glands, that would surely blow the "they are female" theory out of the water.

[]: Re: Thoughts About Evangelion Biology             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Dec 30, 2007 11:59 am NAveryW wrote: Here are some things that are never addressed in the series: -Since the Evangelions have human souls, why were they never developed with the ability to talk? At least with Unit 01, that would have certainly made Gendo feel less alone, and surely it would have made Yui feel less trapped.

[]: Re: Thoughts About Evangelion Biology             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Dec 30, 2007 12:02 pm UrsusArctos wrote: Good point! People turn into tang...wait, does poop turn into tang as well?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Dec 30, 2007 12:05 pm So that stuff is held together by an A.T. Field too? Interesting. I'm sure that they could use that to good effect in cases of... Oh no.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sun Dec 30, 2007 12:08 pm We must preserve the biological purity of the Evas' Precious Bodily Fluids

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Dec 30, 2007 12:38 pm V wrote: Evas' Precious Bodily Fluids

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 30, 2007 1:00 pm http://evageeks.org/FGP/Evangelion_Biological_Listing BrikHaus wrote: If the Evas have prostate and Cowper's glands, that would surely blow the "they are female" theory out of the water.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Dec 30, 2007 1:01 pm BrikHaus wrote: So how does an Eva get off with no genitalia?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 30, 2007 1:08 pm NAveryW wrote: Actually, the best explanation I can come up with for this bizarre anatomy is that the Evangelions are androgynous, have no sexual organs, and are "female" mainly in the sense that the souls inside them are female.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Dec 30, 2007 1:18 pm Reichu wrote: Do they wonder where their (cartilaginous) ears and noses went?

[]:             Quote Post by yokuchi » Sun Dec 30, 2007 2:39 pm NAveryW wrote: EDIT: Even if we disregard the anatomy list that is actually shown, that last point is something to consider. Even assuming the Evangelions do have genitals, they would probably be female. Assuming the syncing is like in the Ghost in the Shell manga, that would be incredibly painful for Shinji. And if, in fact, there are no genitals whatsoever, wouldn't the pilots constantly suffer from numb groins?

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Sun Dec 30, 2007 2:43 pm Who said that they don't actually have the male repdocutive organs?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 30, 2007 2:45 pm The Imperialist wrote: Who said that they don't actually have the male repdocutive organs?

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Sun Dec 30, 2007 2:49 pm If it has the glands. Wait, Evas could be haemaphrodites. It is possible.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Dec 30, 2007 2:52 pm The Imperialist wrote: If it has the glands. Wait, Evas could be haemaphrodites. It is possible.

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Sun Dec 30, 2007 2:55 pm But the so-called Fem Kaworu is not really in a biological sence a haemaphrodite, as I don't think it is something that could really not be considered 'biological' in the first place.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 30, 2007 3:01 pm The Imperialist wrote: But the so-called Fem Kaworu is not really in a biological sence a haemaphrodite, as I don't think it is something that could really not be considered 'biological' in the first place.

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Sun Dec 30, 2007 3:05 pm Probably. But evas must be haemaphrodites then. Fully.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Dec 30, 2007 3:11 pm I doubt the Evangelions have any extensive reproductive system. That includes genitals. Then again, considering Unit 01 came from Lilith, who clearly menstruates, she might have ovaries.

[]: Thoughts About Evangelion Biology             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Dec 30, 2007 11:50 am Here are some things that are never addressed in the series: -Since the Evangelions have human souls, why were they never developed with the ability to talk? At least with Unit 01, that would have certainly made Gendo feel less alone, and surely it would have made Yui feel less trapped. -Can Evangelions get cancer? -According to the anatomy page Reichu has compiled, the Evangelions have cowper glands and prostate glands. BUT THEY'RE SUPPOSED TO BE FEMALE. Whaaat? Do the GAINAX folks just not know basic anatomy? -"Oh no! We've lost the connection to the intestinal bacteria!"
